news.t: Innovator Launches Industry's First Dual Directional Buffer ETFs™

overview.description: The Innovator July Trust Units (DDFL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to make money in both positive and negative markets, on a limited basis, over a one-year period. The fund uses FLEX options based on the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF DDFL was launched on Jun 30, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.

data.title: Innovator Launches Industry's First Dual Directional Buffer ETFs™
data.text: WHEATON, Ill., July 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Innovator Capital Management, LLC (Innovator), the pioneer of Defined Outcome ETFs™, builds on its track record of category-defining innovation ...
